validation_rows.requirement: P3-SPEC-SOURCE review is approved and subject-bound
schema-bound artifact contracts use current required fields exactly
semantic unit map stays atomic and names source refs, source hash, eligibility, and downstream use
PRD element inventory and decisions cover each other without orphan rows
deductive and inductive derivations preserve canonical eligibility boundaries
product expansion gaps block downstream handoff until human decision resolves them
candidate scope stays inside P3-SPEC-DISTILL and does not create locks or implementation code
every distillation output artifact declares the standard artifact envelope fields and records payload key

minimum_test_obligations: explicit page, CTA, input, state, message, role, permission, and UI element source rows map to supported schema element types
inductive candidate remains blocked without human decision
conflicting source rows create conflict decision and product expansion gap when capability choice is required
missing input creates input obligation and does not create product capability
unresolved gap prevents affected row from appearing in closure handoff eligible list
inventory and decision coverage validator rejects orphan inventory or decision rows
artifact envelope fields are required for every output before records are validated
